testcase.name: Success_Login_Formauthentication_Case
testcase.system-out: @scenario.begin @test scenario: Success Login FormAuthentication Case given user navigates to HerokuMainPage ... Status.passed in 1.981s when user on HerokuMainPage clicks on Form Authentication ... Status.passed in 0.589s when user on FormAuthenticationLoginPage enter username as "tomsmith" and password as "SuperSecretPassword!" ... Status.passed in 0.2053s when user on FormAuthenticationLoginPage clicks on login ... Status.passed in 0.4139s then user on FormAuthenticationSuccessPage verifies this message "Secure Area" ... Status.passed in 0.02864s when user on FormAuthenticationSuccessPage clicks on logout ... Status.passed in 0.4265s then user on FormAuthenticationLoginPage verifies this message "Login Page" ... Status.passed in 5.025s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Validate_Error_Message_When_Invalid_Username_Is_Passed
Validate_Error_Message_When_Invalid_Password_Is_Passed
